CAN: verify symplectic form preservation M^T J M = J via pytorch
confirm J^2 = -I (complex structure from symplectic form)
exclude non-symplectic matrices via z3 UNSAT
verify sp(2) Lie algebra generators symbolically via sympy
identify Sp(1) ≅ SU(2) ≅ Spin(3) via Clifford quaternion algebra
access Sp(1) integer irreps via e3nn
encode Sp(6) as terminal leaf of G-tower in rustworkx DAG
CANNOT: contain non-symplectic matrices (M^T J M ≠ J excluded)
be reduced further in the standard G-tower chain
operate on odd-dimensional spaces (symplectic requires even dimension)

pytorch.reason: load-bearing: Sp(6) membership requires M^T J M = J for the 6x6 symplectic form J; torch.linalg verifies this constraint numerically.

pyg.reason: not used: this probe isolates Sp(6) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

z3.reason: load-bearing: z3 UNSAT proves that a scaling matrix M=diag(2,2) cannot satisfy the Sp(2) symplectic constraint M^T J M = J.

cvc5.reason: not used: this probe isolates Sp(6) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

sympy.reason: load-bearing: sympy constructs sp(2) generators, verifies the symplectic condition M^T J + J M = 0 (Lie algebra condition) symbolically.

clifford.reason: load-bearing: Sp(1) = unit quaternions ≅ SU(2) ≅ Spin(3); Cl(3,0) even subalgebra gives the quaternion algebra underlying Sp(1).

geomstats.reason: load-bearing: geomstats provides Riemannian geometry for compact Lie groups; SO(3) ≅ Sp(1)/Z_2 metric verified as adjacent to Sp geometry.

e3nn.reason: load-bearing: Sp(1) = SU(2) = Spin(3); e3nn D^l are SU(2) irreps; the isomorphism chain Sp(1) ≅ SU(2) ≅ Spin(3) is verified via irrep dimensions.

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: rustworkx encodes Sp(6) as the terminal leaf of the G-tower DAG; in-degree=1 (parent=SU(3)), out-degree=0 (no child: most constrained shell).

xgi.reason: not used: this probe isolates Sp(6) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

toponetx.reason: not used: this probe isolates Sp(6) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

gudhi.reason: not used: this probe isolates Sp(6) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

identity_in_Sp6.detail: Identity is in Sp(6): I^T J I = J

block_diagonal_in_Sp6.detail: Block diagonal [[R, 0], [0, R^{-T}]] is in Sp(6)

sp6_lie_algebra_dimension.detail: sp(6) Lie algebra dimension = n(2n+1) = 3*7 = 21 for n=3

J_squared_is_minus_I.detail: J^2 = -I: the symplectic form defines a complex structure

z3_scaling_not_symplectic.detail: z3 UNSAT: diag(2,2) satisfies ad=4≠1: excluded from Sp(2)

z3_symplectic_element_sat.detail: z3 SAT: diag(3, 1/3) is in Sp(2) (ad=1 satisfied)

sp2_generator_e1.detail: e1 = diag(1,-1) satisfies sp(2) condition M^T J + J M = 0

clifford_quaternion_generators.detail: Cl(3,0) bivectors satisfy i^2=j^2=k^2=-1: quaternion algebra ≅ Sp(1)

e3nn_sp1_irrep_dims.detail: Sp(1)≅SU(2): D^j dimensions are 2j+1 (integer j coincide with SO(3))

geomstats_so3_sp1_quotient.detail: geomstats SO(3) ≅ Sp(1)/Z_2: identity belongs, confirming Sp(1) quotient structure

sp6_is_terminal_leaf.detail: Sp(6) is the terminal leaf of the G-tower (most constrained shell)

sp6_last_in_topo_sort.detail: Topological sort: Sp(6) comes last (deepest constraint in tower)

scaling_not_in_Sp6.detail: Scaling 2*I fails M^T J M = J: excluded from Sp(6)

so3_dimension_not_sp6.detail: SO(3) acts on R^3; Sp(6) acts on R^6: incompatible dimensions

sp2_shear_in_Sp2.detail: Shear matrix [[1,t],[0,1]] is in Sp(2): M^T J M = J

J_skew_symmetric.detail: Symplectic form J is skew-symmetric: J^T = -J

J_nondegenerate.detail: Symplectic form J is non-degenerate: det(J) ≠ 0
